description: Engineered core payment and billing services for a high-traffic EdTech platform, facilitating seamless user transactions for learning packages, voucher campaigns, and billing management within a specialized Payment-Finance squad.

Maintained and scaled 10 distinct microservices within the Payment-Finance domain, ensuring seamless cross-squad data synchronization using Golang, gRPC, and asynchronous event-driven architectures (NATS, AsyncQueue).
Integrated multiple third-party payment gateways and managed distributed databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch) to guarantee secure, high-speed, and reliable transaction processing.

Spearheaded a proactive observability initiative by designing and implementing team-specific Grafana monitoring dashboards, successfully accelerating issue resolution by detecting hidden NATS worker failures and process spikes before they impacted production.
Accelerated the student transfer process by over 95% (from 2-3 days to 1-2 hours) by leading the end-to-end development of a full-stack financial tracking system (Golang, Vue.js).
Automated complex financial cross-checking and revenue calculations, enabling the system to instantly evaluate utilized versus forfeited funds and price adjustments across branches.
Streamlined cross-departmental workflows between Operations and Finance by delivering a unified platform that simplified data verification and enabled one-click financial approvals.
Ensured strict data consistency and financial auditability by engineering robust Golang RESTful APIs with strict access controls, preventing unauthorized data modifications.
Spearheaded the infrastructure design for a newly launched customer-facing e-commerce platform by implementing a highly available and scalable AWS cloud architecture (ECS, EC2, RDS, ALB).
Architected a comprehensive end-to-end observability stack (Grafana, Prometheus, Loki) for real-time traffic monitoring and rapid anomaly detection, ensuring high availability and system reliability.
Enabled dynamic auto-scaling to handle e-commerce traffic spikes by automating deployment workflows of microservices using Kubernetes (Helm charts, YAML manifests) and Docker.
Accelerated feature time-to-market by optimizing CI/CD pipelines using GitLab CI, reducing deployment time by 60% and enabling rapid, continuous releases.

E-Commerce Platform: Developed backend services in Golang and designed efficient PostgreSQL queries to enhance data retrieval performance. Instrumented core microservices using OpenTelemetry for end-to-end distributed tracing.
ERP System Migration: Refactored Laravel services into Golang to resolve N+1 query issues, cutting API response time from 5 seconds to 100ms, greatly improving system scalability.
Retail Data Synchronization: Built real-time transaction and stock sync across outlets using Apache Kafka, and deployed per-outlet microservices with Docker.
Search Engine & POS: Implemented Algolia integration for fast product search, and delivered APIs for transactions, stock, and customer management (including PDF generation and email notifications).
